name: meeting-scribe
description: Record, transcribe, and AI-summarize your meetings. Locally, privately, no subscription.
author: Tyler Kells

scripts.predist: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for(const d of ['dist-installer/win-unpacked','dist-installer/win-unpacked.tmp'])fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});try{for(const f of fs.readdirSync('dist-installer'))if(/\.(exe|blockmap|7z)$/.test(f))fs.rmSync('dist-installer/'+f,{force:true})}catch{}"
